Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDESPESCA', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows If &HTTPRequest.Method = HttpMethod.Get Do 'LoadSavedFilters' EndIf JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Despesca' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do Case Case &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 1 &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 Case &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 0 Do 'LoadSavedFilters' EndCase &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterContains") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterLike") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPDTA' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterRange") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterContains") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterLike") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPDTA' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterRange") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterContains") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterLike") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPDTA' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterRange") EndCase EndIf EndIf Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = Despesca.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, DspCod) &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = Despesca.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, DspCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_ManageFilters.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey = !'<#Clean#>' Do 'CleanFilters' Grid.FirstPage() Case ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey = !'<#Save#>' Do 'SaveGridState' SaveFilterAs.Popup(!'WWDespescaFilters', &PgmName + !"GridState") &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 Refresh Case ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey = !'<#Manage#>' ManageFilters.Popup(!'WWDespescaFilters') &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 Refresh Otherwise &ManageFiltersXml = GetFilterByName(!'WWDespescaFilters', ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey) If &ManageFiltersXml.IsEmpty() msg('WWP_FilterNotExist') Else Do 'CleanFilters' SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &ManageFiltersXml) &GridState.FromXml(&ManageFiltersXml) &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' Grid.FirstPage() EndIf EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Despesca.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(DspCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DspAloLotNro1.Visible = False &DspAloUniProNom1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersDspDta1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DspAloLotNro1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPALOUNIPRONOM' &DspAloUniProNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersDspDta1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DspAloLotNro2.Visible = False &DspAloUniProNom2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersDspDta2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DspAloLotNro2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPALOUNIPRONOM' &DspAloUniProNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersDspDta2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DspAloLotNro3.Visible = False &DspAloUniProNom3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersDspDta3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DspAloLotNro3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPALOUNIPRONOM' &DspAloUniProNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersDspDta3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &DspAloLotNro2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &DspAloLotNro3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadSavedFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ManageFiltersData = WWP_ManageFiltersLoadSavedFilters(!'WWDespescaFilters', !"WWPDynFilterHideAll_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'CleanFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &DspAloLotNro1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' Do 'ResetDynFilters' &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &DspAloLotNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPALOUNIPRONOM' &DspAloUniProNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPDTA' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &DspDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &DspDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' AND not &DspAloLotNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &DspAloLotNro1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &DspAloUniProNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &DspAloUniProNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'DSPDTA' AND not (&DspDta1.IsEmpty() AND &DspDta_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &DspDta1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &DspDta_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' AND not &DspAloLotNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &DspAloLotNro2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &DspAloUniProNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &DspAloUniProNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'DSPDTA' AND not (&DspDta2.IsEmpty() AND &DspDta_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &DspDta2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &DspDta_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPALOLOTNRO' AND not &DspAloLotNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &DspAloLotNro3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &DspAloUniProNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &DspAloUniProNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'DSPDTA' AND not (&DspDta3.IsEmpty() AND &DspDta_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &DspDta3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &DspDta_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Despesca" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
